description_long: This is a compact, modern bullpup-style rifle with a distinctive integrated stock and a matte, weathered finish. The rifle features a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, reducing muzzle flash and sound. It is equipped with a red dot sight mounted on a rail system above the receiver, enhancing target acquisition in urban environments. The body is constructed primarily from metal and polymer, with ergonomic cutouts in the stock for a comfortable grip and improved handling. The magazine is integrated into the rear section, typical of bullpup designs, allowing for a shorter overall length without sacrificing barrel length. The overall appearance suggests a tactical weapon optimized for close-quarters and urban operations.
description: A compact bullpup rifle with a suppressor, red dot sight, and a weathered matte finish, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor and the circular barrel opening, with the sight and rail system visible above.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the integrated bullpup stock, suppressor, and mounted red dot sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the textured buttplate, the rear of the sight, and the compact bullpup configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the rifle's ergonomic grip, suppressor, and the details of the sight and stock.
